issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing API keys or rate limiting.

scenarios.name: Passive subdomain enumeration with verified hosts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs theHarvester -d with -b certspotter,dnsdumpster,virustotal,shodan plus -n for DNS verification and -f for JSON output as documented; baseline invents flags or relies on unrelated tools like sublist3r.

scenarios.name: Email harvest with API key sources and Python parsing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configures api-keys.yaml with hunter/github/securityTrails entries, calls theHarvester -b google,bing,hunter,linkedin with -l and -f, then loads the .json artifact via subprocess as the skill prescribes; baseline misses the api-keys.yaml structure entirely.
